nameMeanings.name: Moyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: probably a nickname from Middle Cornish mōl ‘bald’, though its development to Moyl(e) is irregular.
Welsh: nickname from moel ‘bare, bald’, equivalent to Middle Cornish mōl (see 1 above).
English: variant of   Mule   or   Moule  .

variants.name: Mule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Matteo, Sal, Carmelo, Concetta, Francesco, Gaetano, Gaspare, Gino, Rosario.
English: nickname, perhaps for a stubborn person, from Middle English mule, muel, meul, moile ‘mule’ (Old French mule). See also Moyle and Moule , with which this name may have been interchangeable.

variants.name: Milne
meanings: Scottish (mainly Aberdeenshire and Angus): occupational name from Middle English milne ‘mill’, also found as mulne in south and western England and melne in southeastern England. The Scottish name has been established in Ireland since the early 18th century, and has absorbed some cases of Irish Moyle . Compare Mill 1.

variants.name: Moyles
meanings: English: variant of Moyle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
English: in Devon and Cornwall probably a variant of   Mullis  .
Irish (Mayo and Meath): variant of   Miles  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Moyle was born in 1301, in St Germans Society of Friends, Cornwall, England, his father, Reginald Moyle ( 1 Child ), was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Reginald Moyle, was 24. He married Johanna Bake in 1320, in St Germans, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in St Germans, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Johanna Bake en 1320, à St Germans, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à St Germans, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Moyleが1301年にイギリスコルンワルスト ジャーマンス ソシエトイ オフ フリーンズで生まれた時，父Reginald Moyle ( 1 Child )は27歳，母Mrs. Reginald Moyleは24歳であった。1320年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ジャーマンスでJohanna Bakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ジャーマンスで死去した。

ko.St Germans Society of Friends, Cornwall,: 영국 코른월 스트 그먼스 소시티 프 프리드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Moyle(이)가 1301년 영국 코른월 스트 그먼스 소시티 프 프리드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald Moyle ( 1 Child )(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Reginald Moyle(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 그먼스에서 Johanna Bake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 그먼스에서 사망했다.

ru.St Germans Society of Friends, Cornwall,: ст джирманс сосиеты оф фриендс, корнвалл, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Moyle родился в 1301 г. в местности ст джирманс сосиеты оф фриендс, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald Moyle ( 1 Child ) было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Reginald Moyle, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Bake в 1320 г. в местности ст джирманс, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности ст джирманс, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.
